title: Definitely RPG
description: A 1.20.1 Modpack of RPG, Exploration, Battle and a lots of Fun
body:
![the title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41af57bcb705c90f87ab4a01bc6bc1dd3813bc7a.png)

It's a 1.20.1 RPG modpack with Magic, Exploration, Adventure, Coop, Cool Animations and Much More


Main Mods:
- [When Dungeons Arise - Forge!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/when-dungeons-arise)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)
- [Corpse](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse)
- Biome Mods:Regions Unexplored, Biomes o' Plenty and Oh The Biomes We've Gone
- Bountiful
- Ice And Fire
- Essentials Mod
- Artifacts and Relics
- Mobs Mods:Naturalist and Alex's Mobs
- ProjectMMO
- Better Combat

<details>
<summary>minimal specs</summary>


- CPU: unknown 
- GPU: integrated
- RAM: 3G


</details>


  

<details>
<summary>recommended specs</summary>
  
- CPU: unknown
- GPU: Dedicated
- RAM: 6G

  </details>
